occurrence_sentence: Cambridge Quantum Computing Joins CERN in Using Quantum Tech to Explore Particle Physics

interaction_phrase: joined CERN openlab in a collaboration
occurrence_sentence: Cambridge Quantum Computing ("CQC") announced today that it has joined CERN openlab in a collaboration – named the QUATERNION project – to explore the application of quantum technologies to particle physics, according to a company news release.
"We are excited to collaborate with CERN, the European Laboratory for Particle Physics, on this innovative quantum computing based research project," said Ilyas Khan, Founder and CEO of CQC.
Cambridge Quantum Computing and CERN to team up to use quantum computing to explore particle physics.

interaction_phrase: joined CERN openlab in a collaboration
occurrence_sentence: CQC announced today that it has joined CERN openlab in a collaboration – named the QUATERNION project – to explore the application of quantum technologies to particle physics, according to a company news release.
"We are excited to collaborate with CERN, the European Laboratory for Particle Physics, on this innovative quantum computing based research project," said Ilyas Khan, Founder and CEO of CQC.
The head of CERN said working with CQC is part of an effort to develop public-private partnerships to develop the quantum computing industry.

interaction_phrase: welcome CQC and their world-class scientists into collaboration with us
occurrence_sentence: "Quantum computing research is one of the most exciting areas of study today; we are pleased to welcome CQC and their world-class scientists into collaboration with us."

interaction_phrase: will leverage the power of t|ket⟩™
occurrence_sentence: To this end, the CERN openlab team will leverage the power of t|ket⟩™, CQC's proprietary quantum development platform.

interaction_phrase: welcome CQC and their world-class scientists into collaboration with us
occurrence_sentence: "Quantum computing research is one of the most exciting areas of study today; we are pleased to welcome CQC and their world-class scientists into collaboration with us."

interaction_phrase: will leverage the power of t|ket⟩™
occurrence_sentence: To this end, the CERN openlab team will leverage the power of t|ket⟩™, CQC's proprietary quantum development platform.

interaction_phrase: will investigate the application of CQC's four qubit quantum technology device named Ironbridge™
occurrence_sentence: The QUATERNION project will also investigate the application of CQC's four qubit quantum technology device named Ironbridge™* to CERN's Monte Carlo methods for data analysis.

interaction_phrase: joins CERN in using quantum tech to explore particle physics
occurrence_sentence: Cambridge Quantum Computing joins CERN in using quantum tech to explore particle physics

interaction_phrase: the members of the CERN openlab project team to work across multiple platforms
occurrence_sentence: The architecture-agnostic nature of t|ket⟩™ will help the members of the CERN openlab project team to work across multiple platforms to achieve optimal results even on today's noisy quantum hardware.

interaction_phrase: the application of CQC's four qubit quantum technology device named Ironbridge™ to CERN's Monte Carlo methods
occurrence_sentence: The QUATERNION project will also investigate the application of CQC's four qubit quantum technology device named Ironbridge™* to CERN's Monte Carlo methods for data analysis.

interaction_phrase: the teams will investigate for the first time the effects of certified entropy on Monte Carlo simulations
occurrence_sentence: Using CQC's IronBridge™ platform, the world's first commercially available device-independent and quantum-certifiable cryptographic device, the teams will investigate for the first time the effects of certified entropy on Monte Carlo simulations.
